name: mission-control-v2
description: Mission Control v2 - OpenClaw Dashboard (Local Only)

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:collector" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:web: sleep 3 && cd web && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd api && npm install && cd ../collector && npm install && cd ../web && npm install

author: Hari
